list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM flows ORDER BY tenant

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM flows ORDER BY tenant

list.name: zone
list.label: Zone

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM flows ORDER BY zone

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM flows ORDER BY zone

panels.title: Traffic paths: Source AS - Ingress interface - Application - Destination AS

targets.rawSql:
SELECT concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Source AS",
       concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp))), if(inputSnmpIfAlias IS NULL, '', concat(' (', inputSnmpIfAlias, ')'))) AS "Ingress",
       ifNull(application, 'unclassified') AS "Application",
       concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS "Destination AS",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Source AS", "Ingress", "Application", "Destination AS"
ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC
LIMIT $limit

panels.title: Conversations: Source host - Service - Destination host

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ifNull(srcAddrHostname, replaceOne(toString(srcAddr), '::ffff:', '')) AS "Source",
       concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)) AS "Service",
       ifNull(dstAddrHostname, replaceOne(toString(dstAddr), '::ffff:', '')) AS "Destination",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Source", "Service", "Destination"
ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC
LIMIT $limit

SELECT tenant AS "Tenant",
       zone AS "Zone",
       ifNull(application, 'unclassified') AS "Application",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM flows
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)
GROUP BY "Tenant", "Zone", "Application"
ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC
LIMIT $limit
